subject: Magica De Spell from DuckTales in shadow-form — a dark silhouette sorcerer with a single glowing red eye, clutching a book and wand amid purple magical energy
description: An almost entirely black silhouette figure dominates the frame — a witch or sorcerer rendered as pure shadow with a single vivid red glowing eye. The figure grasps an open spellbook in one hand and what appears to be a wand or staff in the other. Books and papers scatter around the scene in chaotic arrangement. Swirling purple and pink magical energy radiates from the figure, creating a dramatically sinister atmosphere. The composition reads as a villain in the midst of a dark incantation, rendered in a deliberately two-dimensional shadow aesthetic rather than a traditionally volumetric figure.
foreground: Black shadow silhouette figure with glowing red eye, holding a book and wand
background: Scattered books, swirling purple-pink magical energy
